purpose: Validate the public leak-proof verifier lab kernel composition: bounded Lean/Lake witness execution, tactic portfolio and target-shape routing, verifier trace repair, provider-hypothesis quarantine, CP2 typed action candidates, bounded Evolve candidates, and negative-case leakage controls.

secret_exclusion_rules.proof_bodies: forbidden; proof-body payloads are rejected while public runtime refs remain source-available
secret_exclusion_rules.oracle_templates: forbidden; oracle comparison remains diagnostic only
secret_exclusion_rules.provider_payload_bodies: forbidden; provider hypotheses are advisory metadata only
secret_exclusion_rules.raw_tactic_scripts: forbidden in CP2 candidates; CP2 emits typed action classes only
secret_exclusion_rules.evolve_source_mutation: forbidden; Evolve is limited to bounded policy artifacts

authority_ceiling: public verifier lab kernel fixture only; not theorem proof authority, oracle authority, provider authority, source mutation authority, benchmark authority, or release operations
anti_claim: This fixture manifest accepts only public verifier-lab composition metadata, bounded component receipts, and negative-case leakage coverage. It does not authorize private proof-body import, provider calls, oracle-to-forward success, arbitrary Evolve mutation, public release, hosted deployment, publication operations, recipient work, or secret export.
